terms.title: Terms of Use and License
terms.intro: Before installing, please read and accept the terms below.
body: Syncora is free and open-source software, distributed under the MIT License. You may use, copy, modify and redistribute it under the terms of that license.
The app is provided “as is”, without warranty of any kind. The author is not liable for any damage, data loss or misuse.
ALASS, FFmpeg and FFprobe are third-party projects licensed under GPL/LGPL. By installing them, you agree to their respective authors' terms.
Syncora data (queue, providers, logs) is stored locally on your computer. Nothing is sent to external servers without your explicit action (e.g., downloading subtitles).
The Windows Explorer menu integration modifies the user Registry (HKCU) to register the actions “Open with Syncora”, “Download subtitles” and “Download subtitles and sync”.
You can uninstall everything at any time using the “Uninstall Syncora” shortcut in the Start Menu.
terms.accept: I have read and agree to the terms above

sidebar.description: Installs Syncora, prepares the essential dependencies and can add quick actions to the Explorer menu.

prepare.title: Set up the essentials before starting.
prepare.subtitle: Pick the destination and let the installer prepare everything the app needs to download, sync and embed subtitles.

deps.title: Dependencies
deps.description: ALASS, FFmpeg and FFprobe for sync and softsub embedding.

explorer.title: Explorer menu
explorer.description: Open with Syncora, Download subtitles, and Download & sync subtitles.

finish.title: Syncora installed!
finish.success: All set. Open the app and configure your subtitle providers.
finish.withWarnings: Installation completed with warnings. Check the logs if anything doesn't work.
